notes: Header refresh (built on live v1.6.54): two visual upgrades on the existing plumbing. (1) Aggregate health pill is now an EKG/heartbeat 'vitals' glyph in a rounded pill with an always-on SYS label; the trace beats faster as health degrades (calm cyan -> gold -> red) and the label swaps to the affected subsystem on alert (OFFLINE / API OFFLINE / SW.. / STORAGE nn%). Roll-up logic + state machine + tap panel unchanged; respects prefers-reduced-motion. (2) The header ghost (identity/overflow-menu button) is now an embedded transparent holographic ghost render (violet circuit-body, ~18KB base64 PNG inline - still single-file, still offline) replacing the old inline SVG blob. The no-identity ALERT state shifts the mark amber via CSS hue-rotate + slow pulse (bitmap can't recolor strokes); menu behavior and the ghost.classList.toggle('alert') wiring are unchanged. Also carries the v1.6.54 widened MASTER search. Verification: JS parse OK (node --check, both blocks), CSS balanced 2388/2388.
